template_data.quote_html: A certification opens the door. Only your pipeline walks through it.

image_headline: CERT OPENS DOORS. YOU WALK THROUGH.
image_prompt: Infographic story layout. Dark navy background. Left: tall illustrated doorway with glowing green frame, bold label 'ACCESS' at top, four short certification labels around the door: '8(a)', 'WOSB', 'SDVOSB', 'HUBZONE'. Right: illustrated professional in suit stepping confidently forward through the doorway. Bold white headline at top: 'CERT OPENS DOORS. YOU WALK THROUGH.' Highlighted coral callout box center-bottom with label 'PIPELINE = WINS'. Footer text: 'Josh Ladick · GSA Focus'.
